meta.summary: Seurat 5.5.0 R runtime for single-cell analysis with SeuratObject, normalization, variable features, PCA, clustering, UMAP, marker testing, and plotting support.
meta.description: Seurat 5.5.0 R runtime for single-cell analysis with SeuratObject, normalization, variable features, PCA, clustering, UMAP, marker testing, and plotting support.

test: Rscript -e 'stopifnot(as.character(getRversion()) == "4.5.2"); stopifnot(as.character(packageVersion("Seurat")) == "5.5.0"); stopifnot(as.character(packageVersion("SeuratObject")) == "5.4.0")' && seurat-runtime-info --version | grep -Fx 'seurat-runtime-info 5.5.0-r1' >/dev/null && seurat-runtime-info | grep -F "$(printf 'Seurat\t5.5.0')" >/dev/null && seurat-runtime-info | grep -F "$(printf 'hdf5r\t')" >/dev/null && seurat-runtime-info | grep -F "$(printf 'BPCells\t')" >/dev/null

Rscript -e 'pkgs <- c("Seurat","SeuratObject","Matrix","ggplot2","patchwork","future","sctransform","uwot","RANN","RcppAnnoy","RcppHNSW","RSpectra","hdf5r","BPCells","glmGamPoi","MAST","SingleCellExperiment","harmony","leidenbase"); missing <- pkgs[!vapply(pkgs, requireNamespace, logical(1), quietly=TRUE)]; if (length(missing)) stop(paste("missing", paste(missing, collapse=",")))' && seurat-runtime-info | grep -F "$(printf 'Signac\tMISSING')" >/dev/null && seurat-runtime-info | grep -F "$(printf 'Azimuth\tMISSING')" >/dev/null && seurat-runtime-info | grep -F "$(printf 'SeuratData\tMISSING')" >/dev/null

tmp=/tmp/taf-seurat-workflow-$$; rm -rf "$tmp"; mkdir -p "$tmp"; Rscript /opt/seurat/share/testdata/seurat_smoke.R "$tmp/out" && test -s "$tmp/out/seurat_smoke.rds" && test -s "$tmp/out/markers.tsv" && test -s "$tmp/out/clusters.tsv" && test -s "$tmp/out/plots/umap.png" && test -s "$tmp/out/plots/umap.pdf" && test -s "$tmp/out/plots/qc_violin.png" && test -s "$tmp/out/plots/qc_violin.pdf" && grep -F 'Seurat' "$tmp/out/versions.tsv" >/dev/null && grep -F 'Gene' "$tmp/out/markers.tsv" >/dev/null && rm -rf "$tmp"

upstream.name: Seurat
upstream.citation: Hao et al. Dictionary learning for integrative, multimodal and scalable single-cell analysis. Nature Biotechnology (2023) [Seurat v5].

meta.summary: Seurat 5.5.1 R runtime for single-cell analysis with SeuratObject, normalization, variable features, PCA, clustering, UMAP, marker testing, and plotting support.
meta.description: Seurat 5.5.1 R runtime for single-cell analysis with SeuratObject, normalization, variable features, PCA, clustering, UMAP, marker testing, and plotting support.

test: Rscript -e 'stopifnot(as.character(getRversion()) == "4.5.2"); stopifnot(as.character(packageVersion("Seurat")) == "5.5.1"); stopifnot(as.character(packageVersion("SeuratObject")) == "5.4.0")' && seurat-runtime-info --version | grep -Fx 'seurat-runtime-info 5.5.1-r1' >/dev/null && seurat-runtime-info | grep -F "$(printf 'Seurat\t5.5.1')" >/dev/null && seurat-runtime-info | grep -F "$(printf 'hdf5r\t')" >/dev/null && seurat-runtime-info | grep -F "$(printf 'BPCells\t')" >/dev/null

Rscript -e 'pkgs <- c("Seurat","SeuratObject","Matrix","ggplot2","patchwork","future","sctransform","uwot","RANN","RcppAnnoy","RcppHNSW","RSpectra","hdf5r","BPCells","glmGamPoi","MAST","SingleCellExperiment","harmony","leidenbase","SeuratData"); missing <- pkgs[!vapply(pkgs, requireNamespace, logical(1), quietly=TRUE)]; if (length(missing)) stop(paste("missing", paste(missing, collapse=",")))' && seurat-runtime-info | grep -F "$(printf 'Signac\tMISSING')" >/dev/null && seurat-runtime-info | grep -F "$(printf 'Azimuth\tMISSING')" >/dev/null && seurat-runtime-info | grep -F "$(printf 'SeuratData\t0.2.2.9002')" >/dev/null

tmp=/tmp/taf-seurat-workflow-$$; rm -rf "$tmp"; mkdir -p "$tmp"; Rscript /opt/seurat/share/testdata/seurat_smoke.R "$tmp/out" && test -s "$tmp/out/seurat_smoke.rds" && test -s "$tmp/out/markers.tsv" && test -s "$tmp/out/clusters.tsv" && test -s "$tmp/out/plots/umap.png" && test -s "$tmp/out/plots/umap.pdf" && test -s "$tmp/out/plots/qc_violin.png" && test -s "$tmp/out/plots/qc_violin.pdf" && grep -F 'Seurat' "$tmp/out/versions.tsv" >/dev/null && grep -F 'Gene' "$tmp/out/markers.tsv" >/dev/null && rm -rf "$tmp"

upstream.name: Seurat
upstream.citation: Hao et al. Dictionary learning for integrative, multimodal and scalable single-cell analysis. Nature Biotechnology (2023) [Seurat v5].
